_comment: Model registry reference for Agent 11. In production this lives in DynamoDB (append-only) with IAM-enforced immutability. Changes require MRO authentication and are logged. This fixture is the source of truth for demo mode.

AGT02-FP-SCORE-v1.use_case: Pre-queue false positive suppression for TMS alerts — reduces analyst workload by suppressing ~50% of alerts as false positives before they reach the analyst queue.
AGT02-FP-SCORE-v1.regulatory_basis: SR 11-7 model risk management; BSA/AML examination manual guidance on alert management efficiency
known_limitations: LLM component (50% weight) introduces non-determinism bounded by Python feature inputs
Historical FP rates require at least 90 days of data to be statistically reliable
Performance may degrade during regulatory threshold changes before retraining

AGT03-KYC-RISK-v1.use_case: 8-factor weighted customer risk scoring for perpetual KYC monitoring. Determines CDD refresh routing: PASS, EDD_REQUIRED, ESCALATE, or EXIT.
AGT03-KYC-RISK-v1.regulatory_basis: FinCEN CDD Rule (31 CFR 1020.210); FATF R.10/R.12; FFIEC BSA/AML Examination Manual; SR 11-7
known_limitations: Adverse media score relies on LLM text classification — subject to model behavior changes
Tenure factor provides low discriminatory power for new customers (<90 days)
Jurisdiction risk scores are updated quarterly — may lag emerging risk events

AGT04-FRAUD-SCORE-v1.use_case: Real-time composite fraud scoring for authorization decisions. Drives BLOCK / STEP_UP_AUTH / ANALYST_REVIEW / ALLOW routing at sub-200ms latency.
AGT04-FRAUD-SCORE-v1.regulatory_basis: SR 11-7; Reg E (EFTA) for provisional credit obligations; BSA/AML for SAR consideration
hard_rules: confirmed_fraud_ip (RULE-091) → BLOCK regardless of composite score
tor_exit_node (RULE-092) → BLOCK regardless of composite score
known_limitations: LLM component (50% weight) is primary discriminator — model is sensitive to LLM version changes
Real-time path (<200ms) uses deterministic rules only; LLM enrichment is async
Historical pattern baseline requires 6 months of labeled data per fraud typology

AGT07-SURV-RISK-v1.use_case: 5-factor surveillance risk scoring across 11 market abuse alert types. Determines CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW severity and HITL routing.
AGT07-SURV-RISK-v1.regulatory_basis: SR 11-7; FINRA Rule 3110 (supervisory procedures); SEC Rule 10b-5; Dodd-Frank § 747
hard_rules: INSIDER_TRADING → always CRITICAL + mandatory HITL (Python frozenset)
known_limitations: Market context LLM node introduces latency variability under high alert volume
Recidivism factor requires 12-month historical window — less effective for new traders
Pattern detection thresholds calibrated for equity markets — may require recalibration for FX/crypto

AGT08-CREDIT-SCORE-v1.use_case: 5-factor credit underwriting composite across 12 loan types. Produces APPROVE / APPROVE_WITH_CONDITIONS / REFER / DECLINE routing for underwriter review.
AGT08-CREDIT-SCORE-v1.regulatory_basis: SR 11-7; ECOA/Reg B (fair lending, adverse action); HMDA; CRA; SR 11-7 model risk
hard_rules: DTI > 50% → DECLINE (all loan types, regardless of composite score)
OFAC_hit → DECLINE_HARD_BLOCK (unresetable by any application code path)
known_limitations: Cash flow analysis depends on document quality from Agent 09 — accuracy degrades with low-quality scans
Collateral scoring for non-standard properties (rural, mixed-use, unique) has higher uncertainty
SBA 7(a)/504 scoring uses specialized weights not validated on conventional loan data

validation_history_summary._comment: Summary of recent validation events. Full history in DynamoDB audit trail.

AGT03-KYC-RISK-v1.conditions: Jurisdiction risk score update cycle reduced from quarterly to monthly
